name: Corn Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 small box Jiffy corn muffin mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9 x 9 pan.
2. Mix together the drained corn, cream style corn, melted butter, beaten eggs, sour cream, corn muffin mix, and grated cheddar cheese.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and smooth out.
4. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour.
5. If using cheddar cheese as a topping, sprinkle it on top of the casserole and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
